title: GLOB unexpectedly does not match
poc: SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 GLOB '-*';
description:
mrigger added on 2019-09-03 18:23:00:
In the following test case, a row is unexpectedly not fetched:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO t0 VALUES (-1);
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 GLOB '-*'; -- unexpected: row is not fetched
The expression should evaluate to TRUE:
SELECT t0.c0 GLOB '-*' FROM t0; -- TRUE
key_bug_features: GLOB operator fails to match negative values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 REAL, c4 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (3.14, X'010203'), (NULL, X'FF');
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c2 GLOB '-*' OR t1.c1 GLOB '-*';
